reviews.review_title: I found A real Functional ghost.
reviews.review_description: So when I went On I turned Green And, I Walked Really slow. And I saw a gorilla named, John. He Had my Color code before I Was green. (I was Pink) and I Touched Him and I got kicked. Dev Response please Is this part of the game? (GO TO PAGE 3 on MESSI He Sawl It to!?)

Let's get over the bad parts of this game

- It's a Gorilla Tag Copy (These games use Gorilla Tag's assets without permission. I know it might be a parody, just don't risk getting sued by having in app purchases)

- You get kicked from the game every 10 seconds
(This is probably an easy fix, just polish some code and you're done, or change the colliders on certain stuff or make somethings just not kick you like jumpscares)

- Performance (Can you add empty objects that have a trigger so that the map you were in before unloads and the new map loads in)

Good Stuff

- It's Loud and Scary
- I met a 8 year old and when he screamed as a monster was chasing him
- John

So this game was a game that you had to buy then another couple weeks it’s free and I played it and it didn’t seem that good… I would recommend playing gtag horror on side quest or playing scary monkey horror on app lab

Not saying this is a bad game, but I would not recommend if there is no multiplayer.
I was falling in the void and getting kicked off the game when i first started playing it
